description:
Write a data analysis script at /home/ga/Documents/analyze_hurricane.py to process 2022 oceanographic data from NOAA Buoy 41046 (/home/ga/Documents/buoy_41046_2022.txt) to analyze Hurricane Fiona's impact. The input file is space-separated with two header rows, using 'MM' for month, 'WVHT' for wave height, and 'PRES' for pressure. The script must filter for September data, calculate the maximum significant wave height (ignoring missing values recorded as 99.00), and calculate the minimum sea level pressure (ignoring missing values recorded as 9999.0). Generate a report at /home/ga/Documents/hurricane_summary.txt containing the maximum wave height in meters and minimum pressure in hPa, formatted exactly as:
Maximum Wave Height: [Value] m
Minimum Pressure: [Value] hPa
